name: Sigma & Octantis
description: Deadly slashes from the Sigma sword are matched only by the force of the Octantis shield when thrown from the air.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: TennoGen: Hotfix 30.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Sigma & Octantis initial combo not working correctly on all Stances.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Hotfix 30.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed causing self damage when using the Sigma & Octantis Heavy Attack while airborne.

patchlogs.name: Update 28: The Deadlock Protocol
patchlogs.additions: Added login milestone reward blueprints (Zenistar, Azima, Zenith, and Sigma & Octantis) to Simaris' Offerings.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.changes:
This also fixed Sigma & Octantis shield popping closed and opened again when holstering. 
This also fixed Sigma & Octantis shield popping closed and opened again when holstering.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Kuva Lich Changes 27.1.0 + 27.1.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Follow-Through stat changing when the Sigma & Octantis and Cobra & Crane are equipped with a Stance Mod.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.4 + 26.0.4.1
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Sigma & Octantis and Cobra & Crane not consuming the Melee Combo Counter on Heavy Attack.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.3
patchlogs.changes: Sigma & Octantis and Cobra & Crane will now throw their shields again when equipped with a Stance other than the default no Stance.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Sigma & Octantis and Cobra & Crane Shield throw animations have been shortened and speed increased.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Update 23.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed shields (Sigma & Octantis, etc) equipping oddly on Chroma Prime’s arm.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.8.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Sigma & Octantis not having any Elemental FX or Energy trails.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.2.4
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the damage and removed the forced stagger of the Sigma & Octantis shield throw in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Clients not being able to throw the Sigma & Octantis (Day 700 Daily Tribute reward) if a Stance Mod is equipped.
